title: Sales Account Manager | Tampines | $2,800 - $3,500 + Travel
description:
• $2,800 – $3,500 Monthly (Based on experience).

  • Tampines Industrial Crescent (with visits to customer sites).

  • Open to Diploma holders in Business, Marketing, or Electrical Engineering.

  • Opportunity for overseas business travel.

Job Summary

We are looking for a dynamic Sales Account Manager to bridge the gap between technical solutions and client needs. You will be responsible for hunting new business opportunities while providing top-tier technical support to existing clients. This is an excellent opportunity for a proactive individual to grow their career in sales operations and account management within the manufacturing sector.

Key Responsibilities

  • Client Relationship Management: Act as the primary point of contact, ensuring client requirements are understood and met with suitable solutions.

  • Technical Guidance: Provide prompt technical support to clients to ensure effective product implementation.

  • Business Development: Proactively identify new business opportunities and build long-term relationships with potential clients.

  • Sales Strategy & Reporting: Assist in executing sales strategies to hit targets and prepare regular reports on market conditions and customer feedback.

  • Cross-Department Collaboration: Work closely with internal teams to align sales tactics with overall company objectives.

  • Market Intelligence: Stay updated on competitive landscapes and industry trends.

Requirements

  • Polytechnic Diploma in Business, Marketing, or Electrical & Electronics Engineering.

  • No prior experience required (Fresh Grads welcome), but experience in the Manufacturing industry is a strong advantage.

  • Excellent interpersonal, communication, and customer service skills.

  • Must be willing and able to travel overseas for business trips as required.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT NOW SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
